name: Tamarind Sparkle
marketing_blurb: Tart tamarind with gentle carbonation, inspired by coastal sherbets.

segment_notes.retailers: Strong pickup in mini-marts; eye-catching amber hue on shelf.
segment_notes.horeca: Pairs well with savory fried snacks; quick-serve refreshment.

name: Fermented Hibiscus Cooler
marketing_blurb: Zesty hibiscus with light fermentation; ruby-hued refreshment.

segment_notes.retailers: Compact cans fit small fridges; attractive for take-away.
segment_notes.horeca: Great as a zero-proof aperitif with a squeeze of lime.

name: Heritage Millet Malt
marketing_blurb: Toasted millet notes in a smooth, non-alcoholic malt drink.

segment_notes.retailers: Steady year-round mover in neighborhood shops.
segment_notes.horeca: Complements hearty meals; versatile menu staple.

name: Cashew Toddy Blend
marketing_blurb: Non-alcoholic toddy-inspired blend with creamy cashew notes.

segment_notes.retailers: Premium artisanal highlight; ideal for weekend promotions.
segment_notes.horeca: Excellent base for signature mocktails and dessert pairings.
